Title: Ameerat Al Arab Sugar Crown Perfume 100ml EDP Asdaaf by Lattafa
Body (HTML):
Ameerat Al Arab Sugar Crown by Asdaaf (Lattafa) is a captivating floral Eau de Parfum crafted for women who love sweet, romantic, and long-lasting fragrances.

Specifications

  • Suitable for: Women
  • Brand: Asdaaf by Lattafa
  • Fragrance Type: Floral
  • Size: 100ml
  • Longevity: 6–8 hours
  • Season: Spring, Summer, Autumn
  • Specialty: Long lasting

Fragrance Notes

  • Top Notes: Strawberry, Grapes, Orange
  • Middle Notes: Rose, White Musk, Jasmine, Gardenia, Ylang-Ylang, Lily
  • Base Notes: Tonka Bean, Amber, Sandalwood

Ameerat Al Arab opens with a juicy trio of strawberry, grapefruit and orange that give the fragrance a sweet, lively opening. It's playful and charming, ideal for bright UK mornings or cheerful outings.

As the fragrance develops, you are enveloped in a soft heart of rose, jasmine and gardenia mixed with white musk and creamy lily. This phase is floral, fresh and mildly sensual, adding depth and femininity.

Finally, the base of tonka bean, amber and sandalwood delivers a warm, inviting finish — ensuring that it stays on your skin beautifully throughout the day.
